outcome.summary: Independently validated Claude's task-specific changed-path ownership hardening (PR #28). All 5 safety checks pass.

acceptance_criteria.name: no union-of-all-active-task writable paths
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Scripts check matches branch against active registry, no union checks.

acceptance_criteria.name: no broad governance directory bypass
acceptance_criteria.evidence: GOVERNANCE_ALLOWLIST was removed; only task-specific paths or registration allowed.

acceptance_criteria.name: fail-closed task identity detection
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Fails on missing, ambiguous, unregistered, or inactive branches.

acceptance_criteria.name: all changed governed handoffs validated
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Scans for and schema-validates all files matching trace/evidence/*HANDOFF.json.

acceptance_criteria.name: adversarial cross-task modification checks
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Verified via 11/11 passing test cases in tests/test_changed_path_ownership.py.

deviations: The validation PR fails closed in CI as expected due to unregistered branch/paths.

impacts.architecture: No product code or runtime impact. Changes restricted to governance verification script, workflows, and tests.
impacts.security: Significantly improves task-based safety enforcement. Prevents unauthorized cross-task file modifications.
impacts.integration: Validates PR #28. Draft PR opened targeting claude/GOV-005-cf5-hardening.
impacts.residual_risk: Branch matching is string-based, relying on GITHUB_HEAD_REF and git refs. Registry modification must still be guarded by human review.

decisions_required: Product Owner approval to merge PR #28 into claude/GOV-005-corrections.
recommended_next_action: Accept Claude's CF-5 hardening and merge PR #28.
